title: SkillsIndex
description: Shape of the generated .agents/skills/skills.index.json manifest. Produced by the skills index generator from every SKILL.md under .agents/skills/{core,stack}/.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the index was generated.

generator.description: Identifier of the tool that produced the index (e.g. script path + version).

name.description: Skill identifier (matches the parent directory name and frontmatter.name).

category.description: For tier=core, the bucket name (typically 'core'). For tier=stack, the subcategory (e.g. 'backend', 'frontend', 'qa').

path.description: Repo-relative POSIX path to the SKILL.md file.

description.description: Mirror of the frontmatter description field.

policyCapsuleBullets.description: Number of top-level bullets in the '## Policy Capsule' section. Bounded to keep capsules scannable.

allowedTools.description: Optional mirror of frontmatter.allowed_tools; null when the SKILL declines to scope tools.

vendor.description: Optional mirror of frontmatter.vendor; null for non-vendored skills.
